column2: The awakened one whose birth benefits all beings
A mind concentrated on a single object
The potential for awakening within each being
The truth of worldly, conditioned phenomena
The truth of ultimate reality (emptiness, Nirvana)
The formless, ultimate reality of Buddhahood
The celestial, blissful form of a Buddha
The truth of suffering in existence
Craving and ignorance as the root of suffering
The end of suffering is possible
Awareness of body, feelings, mind, and phenomena

column3: Breath like wind in a tube
Non-distraction like an old man watching
Naked awareness like a child looking

column2: "The nature of mind is clear light"
